---
title: "R implementations"
---

### IDA report for regression models

[Bacteremia data set](https://zenodo.org/records/7554815) by Georg Heinze

<https://stratosida.github.io/regression-regrets/>

This example is also discussed with R code by Frank Harrell in Regression Modelling Strategies:
<https://hbiostat.org/rmsc/bacteremia>

### IDA report for longitudinal studies

Grip strength data set from the [SHARE project](https://share-eric.eu)

<https://stratosida.github.io/longitudinal/>

### Teaching a workflow for regression analyses with a Pokemon case study

1. Pokemon data

* [Pokemon data set - curated, format: tsv] (assets/Pokemon_clean.tsv)
* [Pokemon data set - after IDA, format: Rdata] (assets/Pokemon_afterida.Rdata)
* [Pokemon data set - data dictionary, format: xlsx] (assets/Pokemon_datadictionary.xlsx)

2. Statistical analysis plan (SAP)

* SAP version 1
* SAP version 2 -update after IDA

3. Initial data analysis (IDA) report 

* IDA report - html
* IDA report - quarto

* IDA additional investigations - html
* IDA additional investigations - quarto

4.  Regression analysis report -main data analysis (MDA)

* MDA report - html
* MDA report - quarto

* MDA additional investigations - html
* MDA additional investigations - quarto
